hero.title: Scale Your Agricultural Vision
hero.subtitle: The first all-in-one ERP designed for the modern farmer. Combining specialized AI models with robust inventory, CRM, and livestock management tools.

features.title: Next-Gen Farm Operating System
features.subtitle: Graminate is built for the complexity of modern agriculture. Our modular tools provide end-to-end management for livestock, smart warehouses, and business intelligence.
features.headline: Ready to Modernize Your Farm?
features.desc: Join thousands of farmers using Graminate to optimize their production and scale their agricultural vision.

solutions.title: Solutions for Every Agricultural Scale
solutions.subtitle: Whether you are managing a family farm or a nationwide distribution network, Graminate provides the modular tools needed to streamline your operations and maximize yields through smart data.

erp.title: Integrated Farm ERP
erp.content: A centralized hub for your poultry, cattle, and apiculture operations. Real-time data sync across all your farm assets.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.content: Leverage specialized LLMs trained on agricultural data for instant advice on animal health, task planning, and reporting.

supply.title: Secure Supply Chain
supply.content: Integrated CRM and Smart Warehouse management with automated low-stock alerts and comprehensive vendor tracking.

transform.title: Innovative Tools to Future-Proof Your Farm
transform.desc1: At {brand}, we bridge the gap between traditional agriculture and modern technology. Our platform empowers farmers with data-driven insights that were previously reserved for giant industrial operations.
transform.desc2: By blending deep expertise in agricultural science with cutting-edge software engineering, we provide a seamless experience for tracking livestock health, managing large inventories, and optimizing workflows.
transform.desc3: Whether you are an individual farmer or managing a cooperative, {brand} provides the strategic tools needed for the evolution of modern, sustainable agriculture.

onboarding.title: Getting Started with {brand}
onboarding.subtitle: A simplified onboarding process designed to get your farm running on our platform with minimal disruption.

mission.title: We Grow Your Agricultural Excellence
mission.desc1: At {brand}, we believe that the backbone of our society deserves the most advanced tools. We transform complex agricultural workflows into intuitive, high-performance digital experiences.
mission.desc2: From independent poultry farmers to large-scale dairy cooperatives, we provide the code that enables your vision. Let’s lead the agricultural revolution together.

footer.tagline: Empowering the backbone of society with next-generation agricultural ERP and specialized AI. Building the future of farming, one byte at a time.

industries.title: Explore Our Industry Expertise
industries.subtitle: Find out how we help businesses like yours thrive.

independent.title: Independent Farmers
independent.desc: Simplified ERP and AI assistance for individual farmers managing livestock, crops, and personal warehouses.

coop.title: Agricultural Cooperatives
coop.desc: Multi-user management, collective inventory tracking, and large-scale data analysis for farming cooperatives and groups.

distrib.title: National Distributors
distrib.desc: Enterprise-grade supply chain management, regional warehouse tracking, and vendor relationship management for national networks.

research.title: Research & Institutions
research.desc: Data-driven insights for agricultural universities and research bodies studying breed productivity and crop yields.
